summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Sree Svadista Prasada homepage and navigation. All 17 features tested successfully. Homepage sections render correctly with proper styling, images load from Unsplash, navigation works across all pages, mobile responsiveness is excellent.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Color scheme (Burgundy #800020, Ivory #FDFBF7, Saffron #F4C430) is consistently applied
Typography (Playfair Display for headings, Lato for body) is correctly implemented
All Unsplash images are loading correctly
Mobile hamburger menu works with dropdown support
Hero slider auto-advances and manual navigation works
All navigation links route to correct pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All homepage sections tested and working: notification bar, header with dropdowns, hero slider (3 slides), two worlds cards, trending carousel, chef's special, meal moments, dabba wala 3-step, svadista cinema, offers banner, snacks & pickles, our story teaser, testimonials, footer. All navigation links work. Mobile responsive design verified.

notification_bar.details: Swagatam! message with free delivery notice displayed correctly

header.details: Brand logo, Menus dropdown (Prasada/Svadista/Breakfast), Cart icon, Account icon all present

hero_slider.details: 3 slides (Welcome Home, Dual Kitchen, Dabba Wala) with auto-advance, prev/next buttons, and indicators working

two_worlds_cards.details: Svadista and Prasada cards link correctly to /svadista and /prasada

trending_carousel.details: Horizontal scrollable carousel with 6 dish cards, scroll buttons work

chef_special.details: Prasadam Pulihora displayed with image and description

meal_moments.details: 4 circular icons (Breakfast, Main Course, Snacks, Specials) present

dabba_wala.details: 3-step section on burgundy background with subscribe CTA

svadista_cinema.details: Video section with play button present

offers_banner.details: 15% OFF banner with HOME15 code and Claim Offer CTA

snacks_pickles.details: UK-Wide section with Shop the Range CTA

story_teaser.details: Our Story section with Read Our Story CTA

testimonials.details: 3 testimonial cards with star ratings on burgundy background

footer.details: Brand info, quick links, services, contact info, social icons all present

navigation.details: All nav links work: Home, Svadista, Prasada, Menu, Subscriptions, Catering, Contact, Our Story

mobile_hamburger.details: Hamburger menu toggle works, mobile nav displays all items

mobile_responsiveness.details: All sections stack properly on mobile, images scale correctly

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED in /app/frontend/src/mockData.js - No backend API calls
